heading: Federal Reserve banks as depositories
label: 290l–3 Federal Reserve banks as depositories
text: Any Federal Reserve Bank which is requested to do so by the Bank may act as its depository, or as its fiscal agent, and the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System shall exercise general supervision over the carrying out of these functions.1So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1
notes: CodificationAnother is set out as a note under .section 562(c)(5) of Pub. L. 101–513section 2293 of this title
